Container.Name: PrintLab
Container.Overview: Print Lab standalone dashboard and API for Bambu printers with multi-printer support, live monitoring, and Works integrations.
Container.Requires: Mapped /data path, printer credentials (or PRINTERS_JSON), and auth settings including ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH plus SESSION_SECRET.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Print Lab web UI port

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent cache/data path (includes printer_names.json)

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Application log level

Config.Name: PRINTERS_JSON
Config.Description: Optional multi-printer JSON array. If set, overrides single PRINTER_* values.

Config.Name: Printer Name
Config.Description: Friendly name for single-printer mode

Config.Name: Printer Host
Config.Description: Single-printer LAN IP/host

Config.Name: Printer Serial
Config.Description: Single-printer serial number

Config.Name: Printer Access Code
Config.Description: Single-printer LAN access code

Config.Name: Printer Device Type
Config.Description: Printer device type override

Config.Name: Local MQTT
Config.Description: Use local MQTT mode

Config.Name: Enable Camera
Config.Description: Enable camera retrieval

Config.Name: Disable SSL Verify
Config.Description: Disable SSL verification for printer/cloud calls

Config.Name: User Language
Config.Description: Language for errors/labels

Config.Name: File Cache Path
Config.Description: Internal cache path

Config.Name: Print Cache Count
Config.Description: Cached print records count

Config.Name: Timelapse Cache Count
Config.Description: Cached timelapse records count. Set to 1 or higher for automatic YouTube uploads.

Config.Name: Usage Hours
Config.Description: Usage hours override

Config.Name: Force IP
Config.Description: Force configured IP over discovered IP

Config.Name: Bambu Region
Config.Description: Bambu cloud region (optional)

Config.Name: Bambu Email
Config.Description: Bambu cloud email (optional)

Config.Name: Bambu Username
Config.Description: Bambu cloud username (optional)

Config.Name: Bambu Auth Token
Config.Description: Bambu cloud auth token (optional)

Config.Name: Require Auth
Config.Description: Require login for UI and API access

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Admin login username

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Optional admin login email

Config.Name: Admin Password Hash
Config.Description: Required hashed admin password. Generate with: python scripts/hash_password.py

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Required random secret used to sign session cookies

Config.Name: Session TTL Seconds
Config.Description: Session lifetime in seconds

Config.Name: Session Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set true when serving behind HTTPS

Config.Name: Makerworks Base URL
Config.Description: Makerworks API base URL

Config.Name: Makerworks API Key
Config.Description: Makerworks API key

Config.Name: Makerworks Bearer Token
Config.Description: Makerworks bearer token

Config.Name: Makerworks Auth Header
Config.Description: Header used for Makerworks API key

Config.Name: Makerworks Verify SSL
Config.Description: Verify SSL for Makerworks requests

Config.Name: Makerworks Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Shared secret for Makerworks job callbacks

Config.Name: Makerworks Submit API Key
Config.Description: API key accepted for Makerworks submit boundary routes

Config.Name: Makerworks Submit Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token accepted for Makerworks submit boundary routes

Config.Name: Makerworks Submit Auth Header
Config.Description: Header name for Makerworks submit API key auth

Config.Name: Makerworks Allowed Paths
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowlist for proxy paths

Config.Name: Makerworks Allowed Methods
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated allowlist for proxy methods

Config.Name: Makerworks Job Callback Enabled
Config.Description: Send job status callbacks to Makerworks

Config.Name: Makerworks Job Callback Method
Config.Description: HTTP method for Makerworks job callbacks

Config.Name: Makerworks Job Callback Path Template
Config.Description: Path template for Makerworks callbacks, e.g. /api/printlab/jobs/{job_id}

Config.Name: Makerworks Attach G-code Enabled
Config.Description: Attach successful G-code records back to Makerworks

Config.Name: Makerworks Attach G-code Method
Config.Description: HTTP method for successful G-code attachment

Config.Name: Makerworks Attach G-code Path Template
Config.Description: Path template for attaching successful G-code records

Config.Name: Orderworks Base URL
Config.Description: Orderworks API base URL

Config.Name: Orderworks API Key
Config.Description: Orderworks API key

Config.Name: Orderworks Bearer Token
Config.Description: Orderworks bearer token

Config.Name: Orderworks Auth Header
Config.Description: Header used for Orderworks API key

Config.Name: Orderworks Verify SSL
Config.Description: Verify SSL for Orderworks requests

Config.Name: Stockworks Base URL
Config.Description: Stockworks API base URL

Config.Name: Stockworks API Key
Config.Description: Stockworks API key

Config.Name: Stockworks Bearer Token
Config.Description: Stockworks bearer token

Config.Name: Stockworks Admin Username
Config.Description: Optional Stockworks admin username for form login flows

Config.Name: Stockworks Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional Stockworks admin password for form login flows

Config.Name: Stockworks Auth Header
Config.Description: Header used for Stockworks API key

Config.Name: Stockworks Verify SSL
Config.Description: Verify SSL for Stockworks requests

Config.Name: Stockworks Allowed Paths
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowlist for Stockworks proxy paths

Config.Name: Stockworks Allowed Methods
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated allowlist for Stockworks proxy methods

Config.Name: Stockworks Filament List Path
Config.Description: Path used to fetch Stockworks filament inventory

Config.Name: Stockworks Filament Items Path
Config.Description: Selector path for filament items in Stockworks responses

Config.Name: Stockworks Filament Color Hex Path
Config.Description: Selector path for filament color hex values

Config.Name: Stockworks Filament Color Name Path
Config.Description: Selector path for filament color names

Config.Name: Stockworks Filament Cache TTL Seconds
Config.Description: Stockworks filament cache TTL in seconds

Config.Name: YouTube Upload Enabled
Config.Description: Enable automatic timelapse uploads to YouTube

Config.Name: YouTube Client ID
Config.Description: OAuth client ID for YouTube uploads

Config.Name: YouTube Client Secret
Config.Description: OAuth client secret for YouTube uploads

Config.Name: YouTube Refresh Token
Config.Description: OAuth refresh token for YouTube uploads

Config.Name: YouTube Privacy Status
Config.Description: Privacy status for uploaded videos

Config.Name: YouTube Category ID
Config.Description: YouTube category ID

Config.Name: YouTube Title Template
Config.Description: Template used for uploaded video titles

Config.Name: YouTube Description Template
Config.Description: Template used for uploaded video descriptions

Config.Name: YouTube Tags
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated tags for uploaded videos

Config.Name: YouTube Notify Subscribers
Config.Description: Notify subscribers about uploaded videos

Config.Name: YouTube Made For Kids
Config.Description: Mark uploaded videos as made for kids

Config.Name: YouTube Embeddable
Config.Description: Allow uploaded videos to be embedded

Config.Name: YouTube License
Config.Description: License for uploaded videos

Config.Name: YouTube Public Stats Viewable
Config.Description: Expose public stats on uploaded videos

Config.Name: YouTube Timelapse Wait Seconds
Config.Description: How long to wait for a timelapse file before upload

Config.Name: YouTube Timelapse Poll Interval Seconds
Config.Description: Polling interval while waiting for timelapse output

Config.Name: YouTube Upload Timeout Seconds
Config.Description: Timeout for YouTube upload requests

Config.Name: BambuLab Git Ref
Config.Description: Build arg: branch/tag for pybambu source

Config.Name: BambuLab Repo URL
Config.Description: Build arg: repository for pybambu source
